title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
